org:us:ein.name: Employer Identification Number
org:us:ein.description: Nine-digit tax identifier the IRS assigns to U.S. organizations. Widely used to match organizations across federal award data.

normalization: Strip the hyphen before storing (12-3456789 becomes 123456789).

org:us:uei.name: Unique Entity Identifier
org:us:uei.description: Twelve-character alphanumeric identifier issued through SAM.gov, replacing DUNS as the primary U.S. federal entity identifier.

normalization: Twelve uppercase alphanumeric characters; excludes the letters O and I. Cast to uppercase before storing or comparing.

org:xi:duns.name: DUNS Number
org:xi:duns.description: Nine-digit identifier issued by Dun & Bradstreet. Formerly the primary U.S. federal entity identifier; retained for historical matching.

normalization: Strip hyphens and spaces before storing.

opp:us:aln.name: Assistance Listing Number
opp:us:aln.description: Program identifier from the U.S. federal assistance listings (formerly the CFDA number). Ties an opportunity to its funding program.

normalization: Two-digit numeric agency prefix, then a three-character program code. Historically numeric (93.575); new listings may use alphanumeric codes as of March 2026 (e.g. 31.A1A). Some programs append a single uppercase subprogram letter (e.g. 84.063P).

opp:us:fon.name: Federal Opportunity Number
opp:us:fon.description: Agency-assigned funding opportunity number that appears on the published notice of funding opportunity. Format varies by agency.

awd:us:fain.name: Federal Award Identification Number
awd:us:fain.description: Identifier the awarding agency assigns to a specific federal award. Reported to USAspending and used to track award activity.

org:grants.gov:system.name: Grants.gov Organization ID
org:grants.gov:system.description: System-assigned identifier for an organization within Grants.gov. Locates and updates the organization record in that platform.

opp:grants.gov:system.name: Grants.gov Opportunity ID
opp:grants.gov:system.description: System-assigned identifier for an opportunity within Grants.gov. Locates and updates the opportunity record in that platform.
